text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this picture is perfect! ☆ I bet it gets a
tooon of likes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah! ☆ I'm super photogenic recently!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Like, check out my smile in this pic I took at the
end of training! It's the cutest thing ever! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Buuut... I don't really get why.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I always used to be so out of breath after races
and training... I wonder what changed?
choice_data_list: You've probably built up your stamina.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh! Now that you mention it, that's probably it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It's all thanks to you and your superstar training!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...I know! I'm gonna throw a surprise event as a
thank you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Get ready for Heartthrob ☆ Umadol Falco's
extra-special photo op!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Duh! If I really want to express my thanks
properly...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
What better way than to show off this cuteness
that we've perfected together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Now's the perfect chance to get a good shot!
Don't hold back! Take as many as you want!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems my daily instruction has helped Smart
Falcon improve both her physical strength and
her Umadol power!
